ddls:
CREATE TABLE "emissions_data" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "total_forcing_wm2" REAL /* Total radiative forcing in watts per square meter */,
  "n2o_forcing_wm2" REAL /* Radiative forcing contribution from nitrous oxide in watts per square meter */,
  "ch4_forcing_wm2" REAL /* Radiative forcing contribution from methane in watts per square meter */,
  "co2_forcing_wm2" REAL /* Radiative forcing contribution from carbon dioxide in watts per square meter */,
  "global_temperature_change" REAL /* Global temperature change in degrees Celsius */,
  "sea_level_rise" REAL /* Sea level rise in millimeters */,
  "ocean_acidification" REAL /* Ocean acidification in pH units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "gas_concentrations" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of concentration measurement */,
  "n2o_concentration_ppb" REAL /* Concentration of nitrous oxide in parts per billion */,
  "ch4_concentration_ppb" REAL /* Concentration of methane in parts per billion */,
  "co2_concentration_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of carbon dioxide in parts per million */,
  "o2_concentration_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of oxygen in parts per million */,
  "n2_concentration_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of nitrogen in parts per million */,
  "ar_concentration_ppm" REAL /* Concentration of argon in parts per million */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_metrics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of emissions measurement */,
  "n2o_emissions_tg" REAL /* Emissions from nitrous oxide in teragrams */,
  "ch4_emissions_tg" REAL /* Emissions from methane in teragrams */,
  "c_emissions_pg" REAL /* Emissions from carbon in petagrams */,
  "hfc_emissions_tg" REAL /* Emissions from hydrofluorocarbons in teragrams */,
  "pcf_emissions_tg" REAL /* Emissions from perfluorocarbons in teragrams */,
  "sf6_emissions_tg" REAL /* Emissions from sulfur hexafluoride in teragrams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which predictions are made */,
  "predicted_forcing_wm2" REAL /* Predicted radiative forcing in watts per square meter */,
  "predicted_temperature_change" REAL /* Predicted global temperature change in degrees Celsius */,
  "predicted_sea_level_rise" REAL /* Predicted sea level rise in millimeters */,
  "predicted_ocean_acidification" REAL /* Predicted ocean acidification in pH units */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_models_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES emissions_data ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions_data_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the user accessing the data */,
  "emissions_data_year" INTEGER /* Year of emissions data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_user_access_emissions_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("emissions_data_year") REFERENCES emissions_data ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_data_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)
